column1: Jim dropped his pen and bent to pick it___________ .
Try to eat your dinner, Jane. You've just been picking__________it.
I don't know where my children have picked_________those rude words.
Albert was really shocked and picked______the words with difficutly.
Can you pick_______your sister in the crowd?
She started criticising my work in front of my colleagues. Everything that I did she picked__________no matter how trivial.
Sarah picked_________a plate of cheese for supper, but she wasn't really hungry.
